narrative:
Precinct Attica Village (precinct in Seneca County) has 580 registered voters, with 58.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.4 percentage points.
